_note: Consolidated mod database. All stats sourced from wiki.warframe.com and verified. Formula: rank_scaling.per_rank * rank (effective = max(1,rank) for display). Endo costs: EBC*2^(rank-1) where EBC=10/20/30 for common/uncommon/rare.

Vitality._wiki_note: Wiki: max rank 10. R0=+9%…R10=+100% (roughly +9-10%/rank due to rounding). Drain: R0=2, R10=12. Common, Madurai.
Vitality.name: Vitality
Vitality.description: Increases the Warframe's Health by a percentage of its base value. One of the most fundamental survivability mods in the game, found across the Origin System.
Vitality.tb_effect: Multiplies your Warframe's base HP by the listed percentage. A max-rank Vitality on a 300 HP Warframe adds +1,320 HP. Equip in a Warframe slot.

Redirection._wiki_note: Wiki: max rank 10. R0=+9%…R10=+100%. Drain: R0=2, R10=12. Common, Vazarin.
Redirection.name: Redirection
Redirection.description: Increases the Warframe's maximum Shield Capacity. Essential for shielded Warframes such as Mag, whose survivability hinges on keeping shields topped up.
Redirection.tb_effect: Multiplies your Warframe's base shields by the listed percentage. At max rank on a 450-Shield Mag, this adds +1,980 additional shields. Equip in a Warframe slot.

Steel Fiber._wiki_note: Wiki: max rank 10. R0=+9%…R10=+100%. Drain: R0=4, R10=14. Common, Naramon.
Steel Fiber.name: Steel Fiber
Steel Fiber.description: Reinforces the Warframe's armor plating, increasing its damage reduction capability. Pairs well with high-armor frames or builds focused on absorbing punishment.
Steel Fiber.tb_effect: Multiplies base Armor by the listed percentage (added to base, not stacked multiplicatively). In TB, armor uses the formula: Armor / (Armor + 300) for damage reduction. More armor = less damage taken per hit.

Flow._wiki_note: Wiki: max rank 5. R0=+17%…R5=+100% (≈+17%/rank due to 6-step scaling). Drain: R0=4, R5=9. RARE (not uncommon). Naramon.
Flow.name: Flow
Flow.description: Expands the Warframe's Energy reservoir, allowing more abilities to be cast before running dry. Fundamental for ability-heavy Warframes on extended missions.
Flow.tb_effect: Multiplies your base Energy pool. At max rank on a 150-Energy Warframe, this adds +225 max Energy — allowing 3 extra 75-Energy casts per refill.

Streamline._wiki_note: Wiki: max rank 5. R0=+5%…R5=+30%. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. RARE (not uncommon). Naramon.
Streamline.name: Streamline
Streamline.description: Reduces the energy cost of all Warframe abilities, making them more economical to deploy. Often the difference between two casts and three per combat turn.
Streamline.tb_effect: Reduces the Energy cost of every ability you cast. At max rank, a 100-Energy ability costs only 70 Energy. Does NOT reduce Exalted Blade's per-turn drain.

Continuity._wiki_note: Wiki: max rank 5. R0=+5%…R5=+30%. Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Rare, Naramon.
Continuity.name: Continuity
Continuity.description: Extends the duration of time-limited Warframe abilities, letting buffs and crowd-control effects last longer before expiring.
Continuity.tb_effect: Extends the active duration of timed abilities (e.g. Excalibur's Radial Blind lasts longer before wearing off). At max rank, abilities last 30% longer than their base durations.

Intensify._wiki_note: Wiki: max rank 5. R0=+5%…R5=+30%. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Rare, Madurai.
Intensify.name: Intensify
Intensify.description: Amplifies the raw power of all Warframe abilities — damage, healing output, buff magnitude, and status strength scale with Ability Strength.
Intensify.tb_effect: Increases ability damage and effect magnitude by the listed percentage. At max rank, Excalibur's Radial Javelin deals +30% more damage and Radial Blind stuns enemies for longer.

Stretch._wiki_note: Wiki: max rank 5. R0=+7.5%…R5=+45% (+7.5%/rank). Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Uncommon, Naramon.
Stretch.name: Stretch
Stretch.description: Widens the reach of area-of-effect abilities, increasing their radius of influence. Particularly useful on frames like Excalibur whose Radial Javelin covers a cone area.
Stretch.tb_effect: Increases AoE ability radius. In TB, Radial Javelin and Radial Blind affect +1 additional random target per 15% range bonus (rounded). At max rank (+45%), reliably hits 3 extra targets.

Heavy Impact._wiki_note: Wiki: Radial knockdown on landing from height. TB adaptation: adds knockdown chance to movement abilities.
Heavy Impact.name: Heavy Impact
Heavy Impact.description: On landing from a significant height, the Warframe emits a shockwave that knocks down nearby enemies. Originally a parkour-combat integration tool from pre-Parkour 2.0.
Heavy Impact.tb_effect: When you use Slash Dash or Radial Javelin (any ability that involves movement), all enemies in the encounter have a 20% chance to be Knocked Down for 1 turn as you land. Stacks with the ability's own CC effects.

Master Thief._wiki_note: Wiki: +6% chance/rank to unlock locked containers. Max rank 5 = +36%. Rare, Naramon. TB adaptation: bonus loot roll.
Master Thief.name: Master Thief
Master Thief.description: Grants a chance to unlock Grineer and Corpus containers that are otherwise locked. The contents are often rare mods and blueprints unavailable from enemy drops.
Master Thief.tb_effect: Passive loot expansion. After each completed mission, grants a chance to reveal a bonus locked cache drop roll on top of normal enemy drops. Not yet implemented in TB v1.

Diamond Skin._wiki_note: TB-original defensive mod. Not in live Warframe. Grants Puncture damage resistance.
Diamond Skin.name: Diamond Skin
Diamond Skin.description: Hardens the Warframe's surface against puncturing force. Reduces damage taken from Puncture sources by reinforcing the frame's outer layer with dense crystalline alloy.
Diamond Skin.tb_effect: Reduces incoming Puncture damage by the listed percentage after armor calculations. Useful against heavily armed Grineer Lancers whose Grakata fires Impact/Puncture-split rounds.

Lightning Rod._wiki_note: TB-original reactive mod. Not in live Warframe. Stores incoming Electricity and releases it.
Lightning Rod.name: Lightning Rod
Lightning Rod.description: A Warframe augment that stores latent electrical charge from the environment and from Electricity procs received in combat. When triggered, all stored charge discharges into nearby enemies.
Lightning Rod.tb_effect: When your Warframe takes an Electricity proc (from enemy or Arc/Tesla effects), store the damage. Your next attack deals the stored Electricity damage as a bonus true-type hit. Max rank stores up to 120% of the incoming arc damage.

Serration._wiki_note: Wiki: UNCOMMON (not common), max rank 10. R0=+15%…R10=+165% (+15%/rank). Drain: R0=4, R10=14. Madurai.
Serration.name: Serration
Serration.description: Serrated rounds tear through targets more effectively, significantly increasing the base damage of all Rifle-class weapons. A foundational rifle mod found across the Origin System.
Serration.tb_effect: Multiplies the total damage of your equipped Primary rifle (Braton) by the listed percentage. At max rank this nearly triples rifle damage output before crits. Equip in a Primary slot.

Point Strike._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+25%…R5=+150% (+25%/rank). Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Madurai.
Point Strike.name: Point Strike
Point Strike.description: Sharpens the ammunition's tip to a microscopic edge, dramatically increasing the chance of landing critical strikes. A staple of any high-crit rifle build.
Point Strike.tb_effect: Increases Critical Chance on every Braton hit. At max rank, the Braton's 12% base crit chance becomes 12% × (1+1.50) = 30%. Each critical hit deals 1.6× damage.

Split Chamber._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% (+15%/rank). Drain: R0=10, R5=15. Any polarity.
Split Chamber.name: Split Chamber
Split Chamber.description: Chambers two rounds simultaneously, giving each trigger pull a chance to fire an additional projectile at no extra ammo cost. One of the most damage-efficient rifle mods.
Split Chamber.tb_effect: Each Braton hit roll has a +90% chance to fire a second round dealing full damage (treated as a separate hit for status proc purposes). Effectively adds ~0.9× extra damage per burst at max rank.

Ammo Drum._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% (+15%/rank). Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Any polarity.
Ammo Drum.name: Ammo Drum
Ammo Drum.description: Increases the maximum ammunition capacity for the equipped weapon. Allows Tenno to carry more spare rounds into battle before needing to resupply from fallen enemies.
Ammo Drum.tb_effect: Ammo is not tracked in TB combat. Passive benefit: reduces the chance of a 'low ammo' status being applied between missions. Full implementation planned for the field supply system.

Fast Hands._wiki_note: Reload speed mod for rifles. TB adaptation: combo momentum passive.
Fast Hands.name: Fast Hands
Fast Hands.description: Trains the Tenno to reload their weapon faster through mechanical memory and optimized muscle response. Reduces the vulnerable window during which the rifle is empty.
Fast Hands.tb_effect: Reload is not tracked in TB combat. Passive benefit: grants a +1 Combo Gauge stack at the start of any turn where the Primary weapon was used in the previous turn (representing maintained momentum). Planned for future polish.

Rifle Ammo Mutation._wiki_note: Ammo conversion mod. Converts pistol ammo to rifle ammo. Not applicable in TB combat.
Rifle Ammo Mutation.name: Rifle Ammo Mutation
Rifle Ammo Mutation.description: A Corpus-engineered mutation cartridge that converts stray pistol rounds into compatible rifle ammunition on the fly. Extends effective combat time in the field.
Rifle Ammo Mutation.base_effect: Convert Pistol Ammo to Rifle Ammo (1:2)
Rifle Ammo Mutation.max_effect: Convert Pistol Ammo to Rifle Ammo (1:6)
Rifle Ammo Mutation.tb_effect: Ammo is not tracked in TB combat. Future implementation: after your Secondary is used, partial energy converts to +5 Primary damage on the next Basic Attack action.

Rifle Aptitude._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% (+15%/rank). Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Any polarity.
Rifle Aptitude.name: Rifle Aptitude
Rifle Aptitude.description: Trains the operator's precision with rifle-class weapons, focusing on maintaining controlled trigger pressure that activates status procs more reliably.
Rifle Aptitude.tb_effect: Adds +90% to the base Status Chance on every Braton hit at max rank (base 6% → up to 96%). Dramatically raises the floor for landing Impact, Puncture, and Slash procs.

North Wind._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% (+15%/rank). Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Vazarin.
North Wind.name: North Wind
North Wind.description: Infuses rifle rounds with cryogenic compounds that bleed cold energy on impact. Each bullet carries a thin layer of frost that can slow or freeze targets.
North Wind.tb_effect: Adds Cold elemental damage to your Primary rifle. Cold procs reduce enemy damage output by -30% for 2 turns. Combines with Heat to form Blast, or with Electricity for Magnetic. Equip in a Primary slot.

Blunderbuss._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. +15% Status Chance/rank, max +90%. Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Any polarity.
Blunderbuss.name: Blunderbuss
Blunderbuss.description: Rechambers shotgun pellets to maximize contact surface area on impact, dramatically increasing the chance of inducing status effects across the pellet spread.
Blunderbuss.tb_effect: Intended for Shotgun-class primaries not yet in the starter pool. When the shotgun system launches, this mod will dramatically increase your proc rate per spread. Hold onto it.

Hornet Strike._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 10. R0=+20%…R10=+220% (+20%/rank). Drain: R0=4, R10=14. Madurai.
Hornet Strike.name: Hornet Strike
Hornet Strike.description: Supercharges pistol rounds with kinetic amplification, dramatically increasing the base damage of all Secondary weapons. The pistol equivalent of Serration.
Hornet Strike.tb_effect: Multiplies the total damage of your Secondary weapon (Lato) by the listed percentage. At max rank, Lato's 26-damage hits become 83 before crits. Equip in a Secondary slot.

Barrel Diffusion._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. R0=+20%…R5=+120% (+20%/rank). Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Any polarity.
Barrel Diffusion.name: Barrel Diffusion
Barrel Diffusion.description: Splits each pistol round at the barrel, creating multiple simultaneous projectiles with each trigger pull. The pistol equivalent of Split Chamber.
Barrel Diffusion.tb_effect: Each Lato hit roll has a +120% chance to fire an additional round at max rank. Effectively adds +1.2 extra hits per shot — one of the highest damage-per-slot mods for pistols.

Heated Charge._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% (+15%/rank). Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Heated Charge.name: Heated Charge
Heated Charge.description: Packs a thermite compound into pistol charges, adding superheated plasma to each round. The burning residue ignites targets, dealing ongoing Heat damage after the initial shot.
Heated Charge.tb_effect: Adds Heat elemental damage to your Lato. Heat procs deal 12 damage/turn for 2 turns and reduce the target's armor by 50% while burning. Stacks up to 4×. Equip in a Secondary slot.

Perpetual Agony._wiki_note: Wiki: Common (not uncommon), max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90%. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Perpetual Agony.name: Perpetual Agony
Perpetual Agony.description: Serrated pistol rounds leave shredded fragments inside target tissue. Once a Slash proc is inflicted, these fragments continue working inward — extending and deepening the bleed.
Perpetual Agony.tb_effect: Extends the duration of Slash Bleed procs (Bleeds) inflicted by your Lato from 2 turns to 3 turns at max rank. Stacks with Rifle Aptitude if both weapons proc simultaneously.

Pressure Point._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5 (NOT 10). R0=+20%…R5=+120% (+20%/rank). Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Madurai.
Pressure Point.name: Pressure Point
Pressure Point.description: Strikes the anatomical weak points of target organisms, amplifying physical impact. Fundamental melee damage mod — the melee equivalent of Serration.
Pressure Point.tb_effect: Multiplies the base damage of melee strikes (Skana/Exalted Blade). At max rank, Skana's 120 base damage becomes 264 before crit and combo gauge bonuses. Equip in a Melee slot.

Fever Strike._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% (+15%/rank). Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Naramon.
Fever Strike.name: Fever Strike
Fever Strike.description: Coats melee blades in a virulent biological compound that deals ongoing Toxin damage. The toxin bypasses physical shielding entirely, poisoning the bloodstream directly.
Fever Strike.tb_effect: Adds Toxin elemental damage to your Skana strikes. Toxin bypasses both shields and armor — HP damage is direct. Toxin procs deal 14 dmg/turn for 2 turns and stack up to 4×. Equip in a Melee slot.

North Wind (Melee)._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% (+15%/rank). Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Vazarin.
North Wind (Melee).name: North Wind (Melee)
North Wind (Melee).description: Cryogenically treated blade edges that shed ice crystals on each swing, adding Cold elemental damage to each strike.
North Wind (Melee).tb_effect: Adds Cold damage to melee. Cold procs reduce the target's outgoing damage by -30% for 2 turns. Combines with Fever Strike (Toxin) to create Viral — halving effective enemy HP for 2 turns. Equip in a Melee slot.

Heavy Trauma._wiki_note: Wiki: RARE (not uncommon), max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% (+15%/rank). Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Naramon.
Heavy Trauma.name: Heavy Trauma
Heavy Trauma.description: Reinforces the melee weapon's striking surface to deliver devastating Impact force. Enemies struck by Impact-enhanced weapons experience severe staggering and disorientation.
Heavy Trauma.tb_effect: Adds Impact damage to melee strikes. Impact procs reduce enemy shield regen by 25% for 1 turn (soft stagger). Pairs well with Pressure Point for staggered, high-impact combos. Equip in a Melee slot.

Rending Strike._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 3. R0: Slash+15%/Puncture+20%…R3: Slash+60%/Puncture+80%. Drain: R0=6, R3=9. Naramon.
Rending Strike.name: Rending Strike
Rending Strike.description: Forges serrated edge profiles and hollow-point cross sections into the blade, amplifying both Slash and Puncture damage on every swing. A dual-element physical enhancement.
Rending Strike.tb_effect: Simultaneously boosts Slash (armor-bypassing) and Puncture (reduces enemy damage) damage on your Skana. Excellent all-round melee upgrade that covers two IPS proc types. Equip in a Melee slot.

Reflex Coil._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+10%…R5=+60% (+10%/rank). Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Naramon.
Reflex Coil.name: Reflex Coil
Reflex Coil.description: Stores kinetic energy from blocked or deflected strikes in a coiled actuator, releasing it as accelerated force on the next swing. Reduces the wind-up time on heavy attacks.
Reflex Coil.tb_effect: In TB, reduces the combo gauge cost of activating Exalted Blade by 5 stacks at max rank (you retain more combo when switching to Exalted mode). Equip in a Melee slot.

Focus Energy._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 3. R0: +10% Electricity, +15% Combo Efficiency…R3: +40% Electricity, +60% Combo Efficiency. Drain: R0=6, R3=9. Naramon.
Focus Energy.name: Focus Energy
Focus Energy.description: Channels the Warframe's electric field through the blade, coating each swing with channeled Electricity. Combo strikes carry additional discharge potential, increasing proc chance per hit.
Focus Energy.tb_effect: Adds Electricity damage to melee. Every melee hit has +40% chance to grant an extra Combo Gauge stack at max rank (on top of the standard +2/hit). Pairs perfectly with Exalted Blade energy waves. Equip in a Melee slot.

Iron Phoenix._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare Sword stance mod. Max rank 0 (no upgrade). Drain: 2. Madurai.
Iron Phoenix.name: Iron Phoenix
Iron Phoenix.description: A Sword Combat Discipline passed down through Tenno dojos. Iron Phoenix favors controlled, linear strikes that build damage momentum — each blow flows cleanly into the next.
Iron Phoenix.base_effect: Unlocks Iron Phoenix combo tree for Swords
Iron Phoenix.max_effect: Unlocks Iron Phoenix combo tree for Swords
Iron Phoenix.tb_effect: Stance for Sword-class melee (Skana). Passive: Each consecutive melee action in the same turn adds +1 extra Combo Gauge stack (stacks with melee's base +2). Synergizes with Exalted Blade chains.

Tranquil Cleave._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare Sword stance mod. Max rank 0. Drain: 2. Vazarin.
Tranquil Cleave.name: Tranquil Cleave
Tranquil Cleave.description: A measured Sword discipline emphasizing efficient cuts over frantic flurries. Practitioners of Tranquil Cleave trust the blade's weight — letting momentum do the work on every arc.
Tranquil Cleave.base_effect: Unlocks Tranquil Cleave combo tree for Swords
Tranquil Cleave.max_effect: Unlocks Tranquil Cleave combo tree for Swords
Tranquil Cleave.tb_effect: Alternative Sword stance (Skana). Passive: Melee hits inflict a guaranteed Slash proc (Bleed) on a Combo Gauge ≥ 10 — bypassing the normal status chance roll. Synergizes with high-combo Finisher setups.

Defiled Snapdragon._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare Sword stance mod. Max rank 0. Drain: 6. Naramon.
Defiled Snapdragon.name: Defiled Snapdragon
Defiled Snapdragon.description: A corrupted Sword discipline recovered from Orokin Derelict vaults. The fluid, arcing strikes of Snapdragon have been defiled — the rhythm is broken, each blow deceptively unpredictable.
Defiled Snapdragon.base_effect: Unlocks Defiled Snapdragon combo tree for Swords
Defiled Snapdragon.max_effect: Unlocks Defiled Snapdragon combo tree for Swords
Defiled Snapdragon.tb_effect: Rare Sword stance (Skana). Passive: On a CRIT hit during melee, the next melee action this turn costs 0 actions (free strike). The free strike cannot itself trigger this passive again. Extremely powerful in high-combo situations.

Stance Mod (Various)._wiki_note: TB placeholder for stances not yet individually catalogued.
Stance Mod (Various).name: Stance Mod (Various)
Stance Mod (Various).description: A placeholder representing a broad class of Combat Discipline mods that teach specialized melee combo routes. Different stances dramatically alter the rhythm and reach of melee attacks.
Stance Mod (Various).tb_effect: This placeholder represents a random stance from the drop table. Specific TB passive will be detailed once the exact stance is identified. Stance mods are always equippable at Rank 0 with no leveling required.

Fast Deflection._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+5%…R5=+25% (+5%/rank) Shield Recharge Rate. Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Vazarin.
Fast Deflection.name: Fast Deflection
Fast Deflection.description: Accelerates the recovery rate of the Warframe's shields, reducing the delay before they begin regenerating after taking damage.
Fast Deflection.tb_effect: Reduces the number of turns before your shield recharge starts. At max rank, shields begin recovering 1 turn sooner after taking hits. Synergizes with Redirection on high-shield frames.

Vigor._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+24%…R5=+120% Health AND Shields simultaneously. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Vazarin.
Vigor.name: Vigor
Vigor.description: A dual-purpose enhancement that simultaneously boosts both the Warframe's Health and Shield Capacity. Sacrifices specialization for broad survivability coverage.
Vigor.tb_effect: Provides a smaller bonus than dedicated Vitality or Redirection but covers both HP and shields simultaneously. At max rank adds +120% to both pools — great for balanced survivability in a single mod slot.

Armored Agility._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+9%…R5=+45% Armor. Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Naramon.
Armored Agility.name: Armored Agility
Armored Agility.description: Weaves micro-alloy fibers throughout the Warframe's frame to improve damage absorption while keeping the suit agile and responsive.
Armored Agility.tb_effect: Increases armor damage reduction. At max rank +45%, Excalibur's 240 armor becomes 348 — improving damage reduction from ~44.4% to ~53.7%. Pairs well with Steel Fiber for stacking armor builds.

Rush._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. +10%/rank Sprint Speed. TB adaptation: bonus dodge chance. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Naramon.
Rush.name: Rush
Rush.description: Overcharges the Warframe's motor servos for burst-speed movement. Originally designed for extraction-speed runs, it also proves useful in rapid flanking maneuvers.
Rush.tb_effect: In TB, Sprint Speed translates to a +10% chance per 10% bonus to dodge an incoming attack (max +50% at rank 5). Excalibur with Rush max-ranked has a 50% dodge roll added to his base dodge. Does not stack with Slash Dash evasion.

Quick Thinking._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. Converts Energy to Health on lethal hit. +60%/rank efficiency. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Naramon.
Quick Thinking.name: Quick Thinking
Quick Thinking.description: An emergency survival mod that intercepts a killing blow and instead drains the Warframe's Energy reserves to absorb the damage. When energy runs out, the protection ends.
Quick Thinking.tb_effect: When a hit would reduce you to 0 HP, spend Energy instead at a 1-Energy-per-HP rate (modified by rank). At max rank, 150 Energy can absorb 450 HP of overflow damage. Triggers once per combat — the mod deactivates if you survive the intercept.

Rage._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. Converts damage taken to Energy. +2%/rank. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Madurai.
Rage.name: Rage
Rage.description: Taps into the Warframe's pain response to generate energy. Every hit taken is partially converted into usable ability fuel — the more damage absorbed, the more energy produced.
Rage.tb_effect: After taking Health damage (not shield), convert 10% of the damage taken into Energy at max rank. E.g. taking 100 HP damage gives +10 Energy. Synergizes with Quick Thinking. Pairs with high-HP Warframes who can afford to take hits.

Natural Talent._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 3. +25%/rank cast speed. Drain: R0=6, R3=9. Any polarity.
Natural Talent.name: Natural Talent
Natural Talent.description: Refines the neural pathways that initiate ability activation, dramatically reducing the animation commitment of Warframe powers.
Natural Talent.tb_effect: In TB, abilities activated with Natural Talent equipped do not cost an action (can be cast as a bonus action, once per turn, at max rank). Lower ranks reduce cast time instead. Excellent for Excalibur's Radial Blind setup.

Constitution._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. +10%/rank Ability Duration, +8%/rank Knockdown Recovery. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Naramon.
Constitution.name: Constitution
Constitution.description: Toughens the Warframe's physical and neurological resilience. Ability effects last longer and the frame recovers from destabilizing impacts faster.
Constitution.tb_effect: Increases timed ability durations by 50% at max rank and reduces the Knockdown debuff duration by 1 additional turn (at max rank). Stacks with Continuity for extreme duration builds.

Fleeting Expertise._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. +10%/rank Ability Efficiency (capped at 75%), -10%/rank Ability Duration. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Naramon.
Fleeting Expertise.name: Fleeting Expertise
Fleeting Expertise.description: Strips unnecessary overhead from ability execution routines, slashing energy costs at the expense of how long effects persist. A trade of duration for sustainability.
Fleeting Expertise.tb_effect: At max rank, reduces ability energy cost by 50% (a 100-Energy ability costs 50) but also halves ability duration. Combine with Continuity/Constitution to offset the duration penalty while keeping the efficiency gain.

Enemy Sense._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. +6m/rank Enemy Detection Radius. TB: bonus preemptive strike chance. Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Naramon.
Enemy Sense.name: Enemy Sense
Enemy Sense.description: Amplifies the Warframe's environmental awareness systems, displaying nearby enemy positions on the minimap at greater range. Invaluable in stealth or ambush scenarios.
Enemy Sense.tb_effect: In TB, grants a +6% chance per rank (max +30%) to get a free preemptive strike action at the start of combat before enemies act. The bonus strike uses your equipped weapon at half damage. Does not trigger abilities.

Animal Instinct._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 3. Enemy Loot Radar + increased detection. Drain: R0=2, R3=5. Naramon.
Animal Instinct.name: Animal Instinct
Animal Instinct.description: Heightens the Warframe's sensory integration through feral pattern recognition algorithms, detecting both life signs and resource deposits at greater range.
Animal Instinct.tb_effect: At max rank, improves the quality tier of one random enemy drop per mission by one step (e.g. Common→Uncommon). Does not guarantee rare drops but consistently upgrades lower-tier loot rolls.

Power Drift._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon (Exilus mod), max rank 3. +15%/rank Ability Strength, +30%/rank knockdown resist. Drain: R0=2, R3=5. Vazarin.
Power Drift.name: Power Drift
Power Drift.description: A Drift-class mod tuned for combat endurance. Amplifies ability output while hardening the neural link against physical destabilization from impact forces.
Power Drift.tb_effect: Provides +45% ability strength at max rank (stacks with Intensify) and reduces Knockdown debuff duration by 1 turn. Full knockdown immunity requires both Power Drift and Constitution equipped together.

Hellfire._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Heat Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Hellfire.name: Hellfire
Hellfire.description: Superheats rifle rounds using a thermite-tipped coating, adding a scorching Heat component to each shot. Targets engulfed in flames suffer burning damage beyond the initial impact.
Hellfire.tb_effect: Adds Heat damage to your MK1-Braton or Paris shots. Heat procs deal 12 dmg/turn for 2 turns and halve enemy armor while burning. Combine with Infected Clip (Toxin) to create Gas — AoE Toxin cloud on proc. Equip in a Primary slot.

Infected Clip._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Toxin Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Naramon.
Infected Clip.name: Infected Clip
Infected Clip.description: Loads the rifle's magazine with biologically contaminated rounds carrying a virulent compound. The toxin bypasses shield systems entirely, poisoning the bloodstream on contact.
Infected Clip.tb_effect: Adds Toxin damage to your rifle. Toxin bypasses both shields and armor, hitting HP directly. Procs deal 14 dmg/turn for 2 turns. Combine with Cryo Rounds (Cold) to create Viral — halves effective enemy HP for 2 turns.

Cryo Rounds._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Cold Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Vazarin.
Cryo Rounds.name: Cryo Rounds
Cryo Rounds.description: Cryogenic rounds that flash-freeze on impact, adding Cold elemental damage to every shot. Cold procs slow targets and reduce their offensive output.
Cryo Rounds.tb_effect: Adds Cold damage to your rifle. Cold procs reduce the target's outgoing damage by -30% for 2 turns. Combine with Infected Clip (Toxin) to create Viral — one of the strongest elemental combos, halving effective HP.

Stormbringer._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Electricity Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Stormbringer.name: Stormbringer
Stormbringer.description: Charges rifle rounds with high-voltage electrical energy, delivering a shock with every hit. Chain discharge arcs can leap between nearby enemies, making dense formations especially vulnerable.
Stormbringer.tb_effect: Adds Electricity damage to your rifle. Electricity procs chain-stun: on proc, target and a random second enemy are both Stunned for 1 turn. Combine with Hellfire (Heat) to create Radiation — confuses enemies into friendly fire.

Piercing Hit._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Puncture Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Piercing Hit.name: Piercing Hit
Piercing Hit.description: Sharpens rifle rounds to armor-piercing tips that punch through protective plating, reducing the damage reduction of heavily armored targets on proc.
Piercing Hit.tb_effect: Adds Puncture damage to your rifle. Puncture procs reduce the target's outgoing damage by -30% for 1 turn (stagger effect). Excellent against Grineer Lancers — the -30% damage debuff also reduces their Heavy Gunner bonus attacks.

Hammer Shot._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. R0: +20% Crit Damage, +10% Status…R5: +100% Crit Damage, +40% Status. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Hammer Shot.name: Hammer Shot
Hammer Shot.description: A hybrid precision-round that concentrates mass at the tip for maximum kinetic transfer on critical strikes, while the disintegrating casing showers the target with status-triggering fragments.
Hammer Shot.tb_effect: Doubles critical hit damage multiplier of your rifle at max rank AND increases elemental proc rates. Pairing with Point Strike and Split Chamber creates a devastating crit-status hybrid build.

Malignant Force._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15% Toxin, +10% Status…R5=+90% Toxin, +60% Status. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Naramon.
Malignant Force.name: Malignant Force
Malignant Force.description: Combines an aggressive bioweapon payload with a high-dispersion delivery mechanism, maximizing both toxin dose and status application frequency.
Malignant Force.tb_effect: Adds Toxin damage and dramatically increases proc frequency. At max rank, nearly guarantees a Toxin proc on each hit while adding +90% base Toxin damage. Best on fast-firing MK1-Braton for near-100% proc coverage.

Rime Rounds._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15% Cold, +10% Status…R5=+90% Cold, +60% Status. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Vazarin.
Rime Rounds.name: Rime Rounds
Rime Rounds.description: Dual-layered cryo rounds with an outer shatter-dispersion coating. The immediate Cold impact is followed by a micro-crystal cloud that sustains the proc duration.
Rime Rounds.tb_effect: Adds Cold damage and high status chance to your rifle. Cold procs reliably slow targets. Combine with Infected Clip for near-guaranteed Viral procs — consistently halving enemy effective HP pool.

High Caliber._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. R0=+20%…R5=+110% Rifle Damage, with accuracy penalty. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
High Caliber.name: High Caliber
High Caliber.description: Dramatically up-sizes the rifle's bore and ammunition, delivering massive damage increases at the cost of shot precision. Best used in close-quarters where accuracy matters less.
High Caliber.tb_effect: Stacks with Serration for extreme rifle damage totals. In TB, the accuracy penalty reduces hit chance by 15% (max rank), which is mitigated by the game's base accuracy. Net result: more damage, slightly lower hit frequency — still a strong DPS mod.

Vigilante Armaments._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Multishot. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Any polarity.
Vigilante Armaments.name: Vigilante Armaments
Vigilante Armaments.description: Overloads the rifle's firing mechanism to launch multiple rounds per trigger pull. A less extreme but more energy-efficient alternative to Split Chamber.
Vigilante Armaments.tb_effect: Adds a 90% chance per hit roll to fire an additional projectile at max rank. Effectively +0.9 hits per action. Lower than Split Chamber's 150% but uses less mod capacity. Good choice when capacity is tight.

Shred._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. R0=+5% Fire Rate, +0.2 Punch Through…R5=+30% Fire Rate, +1.2 Punch Through. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Naramon.
Shred.name: Shred
Shred.description: Optimizes the rifle's cyclic rate and installs a hyper-dense penetrator tip, allowing rounds to punch through multiple targets and armor panels simultaneously.
Shred.tb_effect: In TB, Punch Through grants a 25% chance per rank (max +125%) that a rifle hit applies to a second enemy simultaneously. At max rank, effectively hits two targets per action, doubling damage output against grouped enemies.

Point Blank._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Shotgun Damage. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Madurai.
Point Blank.name: Point Blank
Point Blank.description: Optimizes the spread pattern for close engagements, ensuring pellet concentration on target. The shotgun equivalent of Serration for base damage.
Point Blank.tb_effect: Multiplies your Shotgun's base damage by up to +90% at max rank. The foundational shotgun damage mod — equip this before any other shotgun mod when using a shotgun weapon.

Hell's Chamber._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. R0=+20%…R5=+120% Multishot. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Any polarity.
Hell's Chamber.name: Hell's Chamber
Hell's Chamber.description: Modifies the shotgun chamber to eject a second volley of pellets on each trigger pull. The shotgun equivalent of Split Chamber — an essential damage multiplier.
Hell's Chamber.tb_effect: At max rank, each shotgun attack has a +120% chance to fire an extra volley. Effectively +1.2 additional hit rolls per action — highest DPS multiplier available for shotguns.

Chilling Grasp._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Cold Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Vazarin.
Chilling Grasp.name: Chilling Grasp
Chilling Grasp.description: Packed with frozen pellets that flash-chill on impact, adding Cold damage to shotgun blasts. Targets struck by multiple pellets are slowed more severely.
Chilling Grasp.tb_effect: Adds Cold damage to your shotgun. Cold procs reduce enemy outgoing damage by -30% for 2 turns. Multiple-pellet hits in one action multiply proc chances — shotguns are excellent proc appliers.

Contagious Spread._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Toxin Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Naramon.
Contagious Spread.name: Contagious Spread
Contagious Spread.description: Bioactive pellets that rupture on impact and release a cloud of bio-toxin. The wide spread of shotgun fire makes this especially effective at blanketing multiple enemies.
Contagious Spread.tb_effect: Adds Toxin damage to your shotgun. Toxin bypasses shields and armor. Combine with Charged Shell (Electricity) to create Corrosive — strips enemy armor entirely on proc. Best anti-Grineer shotgun setup.

Charged Shell._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Electricity Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Charged Shell.name: Charged Shell
Charged Shell.description: Electrostatically charged pellets that deliver a jolt on impact. Each pellet can independently arc to adjacent enemies, making this devastating against clustered targets.
Charged Shell.tb_effect: Adds Electricity damage to your shotgun. Electricity procs stun target and a random second enemy for 1 turn. Combine with Contagious Spread (Toxin) to create Corrosive — strips armor permanently on proc.

Toxic Barrage._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15% Toxin, +10% Status…R5=+90% Toxin, +60% Status. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Naramon.
Toxic Barrage.name: Toxic Barrage
Toxic Barrage.description: A high-concentration bioweapon shell optimized for wide-area contamination. Each pellet independently carries a full payload, dramatically increasing Toxin status coverage.
Toxic Barrage.tb_effect: Combines Toxin damage with status generation. Multiple pellets per shot means each fires a status roll — shotguns apply statuses faster than any other weapon type. Near-guaranteed Toxin procs at max rank.

Shotgun Ammo Mutation._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 3. +25%/rank ammo pickup conversion. Drain: R0=4, R3=7. Any polarity.
Shotgun Ammo Mutation.name: Shotgun Ammo Mutation
Shotgun Ammo Mutation.description: Installs a micro-refiner that converts incompatible ammunition types into usable shotgun shells. Prevents ammo starvation on long missions.
Shotgun Ammo Mutation.tb_effect: In TB, grants +1 additional shotgun ammo per enemy defeated at max rank. Useful in prolonged multi-wave encounters where normal drops may not keep pace with consumption.

Flechette._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Puncture Damage. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Naramon.
Flechette.name: Flechette
Flechette.description: Replaces standard pellets with hyper-dense needle-shaped flechette projectiles that punch through armor plating. Ideal against hardened Grineer targets.
Flechette.tb_effect: Adds Puncture damage to your shotgun. Puncture procs reduce enemy outgoing damage by -30% for 1 turn and reduce their armor by 15% for the proc duration. Best against Grineer Ballistas and Lancers.

Accelerated Blast._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+5% Fire Rate, +15% Puncture…R5=+30% Fire Rate, +90% Puncture. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Naramon.
Accelerated Blast.name: Accelerated Blast
Accelerated Blast.description: A dual-enhancement mod that upgrades the shot cycle speed and loads armor-piercing flechettes simultaneously. Combines offense and utility in a single slot.
Accelerated Blast.tb_effect: Increases shotgun actions per turn (fire rate) and adds Puncture damage simultaneously. In TB, +30% fire rate translates to a +30% chance of an extra attack action per turn at max rank.

Lethal Torrent._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. R0=+6% Fire Rate, +12% Multishot…R5=+30% Fire Rate, +60% Multishot. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Any polarity.
Lethal Torrent.name: Lethal Torrent
Lethal Torrent.description: Overclocks the pistol's trigger mechanism and chamber cycling simultaneously, producing both a higher rate of fire and a higher projectile volume per trigger pull.
Lethal Torrent.tb_effect: Dual-DPS pistol mod. In TB, +30% fire rate adds a 30% chance of an extra secondary attack, while +60% multishot adds a 60% chance of an extra projectile per hit. Together, nearly double pistol DPS output.

Quickdraw._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Reload Speed. Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Naramon.
Quickdraw.name: Quickdraw
Quickdraw.description: A spring-loaded magazine system and reduced-friction grip enable blazing-fast pistol reloads. Eliminates the primary vulnerability of pistols in sustained engagements.
Quickdraw.tb_effect: Reduces pistol reload turns. At max rank, the Lato never needs a dedicated reload action — after emptying the magazine, it automatically reloads as a free action. Provides seamless sustained combat.

Pistol Gambit._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+20%…R5=+120% Critical Chance. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Madurai.
Pistol Gambit.name: Pistol Gambit
Pistol Gambit.description: Recalibrates the pistol's barrel harmonics and sight alignment for maximum critical hit potential. The gambit is accepting slightly higher recoil in exchange for dramatically improved hit quality.
Pistol Gambit.tb_effect: Dramatically increases Lato's critical hit rate. At max rank, each Lato hit has +120% additional crit chance on top of its base 10% — effectively guaranteeing crits with every shot in most builds.

Target Cracker._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Critical Multiplier. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Target Cracker.name: Target Cracker
Target Cracker.description: Hollow-point ammunition with a fragmentation core that explodes outward on critical strikes, devastating organic tissue beyond the point of impact.
Target Cracker.tb_effect: Increases the damage multiplier of Lato critical hits at max rank by +90% (e.g. 2.0x becomes 2.9x before other crits multipliers). Pair with Pistol Gambit to ensure both high crit rate and high crit damage.

Pathogen Rounds._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Toxin Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Naramon.
Pathogen Rounds.name: Pathogen Rounds
Pathogen Rounds.description: Pistol rounds packed with a virulent biological payload that bypasses shielding to attack biological systems directly. Especially effective against unshielded targets.
Pathogen Rounds.tb_effect: Adds Toxin damage to your Lato or Kunai. Toxin bypasses both shields and armor, dealing direct HP damage. Combine with Deep Freeze (Cold) to create Viral for devastating anti-infantry effectiveness.

Pistol Ammo Mutation._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 3. +25%/rank ammo pickup conversion. Drain: R0=4, R3=7. Any polarity.
Pistol Ammo Mutation.name: Pistol Ammo Mutation
Pistol Ammo Mutation.description: Converts incompatible ammo types into pistol rounds through a miniaturized onboard fabricator, ensuring a steady supply of Secondary ammunition even when drops are scarce.
Pistol Ammo Mutation.tb_effect: Grants +1 pistol ammo per enemy kill at max rank. In TB, prevents running dry mid-combat. Most useful in extended multi-wave encounters or when Kunai's limited magazine is a constraint.

Convulsion._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Electricity Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Convulsion.name: Convulsion
Convulsion.description: Electrifies the pistol's rounds using a compact galvanic charger. The discharge disrupts nervous systems and electrical components on impact.
Convulsion.tb_effect: Adds Electricity damage to your pistol. Electricity procs stun target and chain to a random second enemy for 1 turn. Excellent disruption tool. Combine with Pathogen Rounds (Toxin) for Corrosive against armored Grineer.

Deep Freeze._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Cold Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Vazarin.
Deep Freeze.name: Deep Freeze
Deep Freeze.description: Cryogenic pistol ammunition that releases expanding cryo-gel on impact, adding a Cold component to each shot. Multiple hits can freeze targets solid.
Deep Freeze.tb_effect: Adds Cold damage to your pistol. Cold procs reduce enemy outgoing damage by -30% for 2 turns. Combine with Pathogen Rounds (Toxin) to create Viral — an excellent Corpus and Grineer secondary loadout.

Scorch._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Heat Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Scorch.name: Scorch
Scorch.description: A thermite-based pistol round that burns through organic and synthetic material alike, adding a sustained Heat component to each shot.
Scorch.tb_effect: Adds Heat damage to your pistol. Heat procs deal 12 dmg/turn for 2 turns and reduce enemy armor by 50% while burning. Stacks 4×. Excellent against Grineer who rely on armor mitigation.

Slip Magazine._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+5%…R5=+30% Magazine Capacity. Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Any polarity.
Slip Magazine.name: Slip Magazine
Slip Magazine.description: Extended magazine housing that increases the pistol's ammo capacity per reload cycle, enabling more shots per action sequence before a reload becomes necessary.
Slip Magazine.tb_effect: Increases max magazine size by 30% at rank 5. For the Lato (18 rounds), this adds ~5 additional rounds per magazine. Reduces forced reload frequency in sustained fights. Budget utility mod for Secondary slots.

Sure Shot._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+10%…R5=+60% Status Chance. Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Any polarity.
Sure Shot.name: Sure Shot
Sure Shot.description: Reconfigures the pistol round's dispersion pattern for maximum surface contact on each impact, improving the probability that elemental payloads activate on hit.
Sure Shot.tb_effect: Greatly increases the chance of triggering elemental procs with every pistol hit. At max rank, pairs with any elemental pistol mod (Scorch, Deep Freeze, etc.) to guarantee proc application. A cheap status enabler.

Molten Impact._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Heat Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Molten Impact.name: Molten Impact
Molten Impact.description: Infuses the melee weapon with superheated plasma, causing each blow to leave scorching burns in addition to physical trauma.
Molten Impact.tb_effect: Adds Heat damage to your melee weapon. Heat procs deal 12 dmg/turn for 2 turns and halve enemy armor. Combine with Shocking Touch (Electricity) to create Radiation — confuses enemies for 2 turns, forcing friendly fire.

Shocking Touch._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Electricity Damage. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Shocking Touch.name: Shocking Touch
Shocking Touch.description: Channels the Warframe's bioelectric field through the melee weapon, delivering shocking jolts on each strike that can chain to nearby enemies.
Shocking Touch.tb_effect: Adds Electricity damage to melee. Electricity procs stun target and arc to a random second enemy for 1 turn — exceptionally strong in TB since it effectively crowd-controls two enemies simultaneously.

Killing Blow._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+20%…R5=+120% Heavy Attack Damage. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Madurai.
Killing Blow.name: Killing Blow
Killing Blow.description: Recalibrates the melee actuators for maximum power delivery on heavy, committed strikes. Trades the flexibility of light attacks for devastating focused blows.
Killing Blow.tb_effect: In TB, Exalted Blade energy waves (heavy attack equivalent) deal +120% more damage at max rank. Converts Excalibur's melee burst into an extremely high-damage finisher for low-HP targets.

Spoiled Strike._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. R0=+25%…R5=+100% Melee Damage, -10%/rank Attack Speed. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Madurai.
Spoiled Strike.name: Spoiled Strike
Spoiled Strike.description: Weights the melee weapon with dense kinetic mass for maximum striking force, at the cost of swing speed. Every blow lands with devastating power — but you can only land so many per turn.
Spoiled Strike.tb_effect: At max rank adds +100% melee damage (stacks with Pressure Point) but reduces attacks per turn by 1 (minimum 1). Net result: fewer, much harder hits. Best on Bo staff builds that proc Combo gauge quickly from high single-hit impact.

Volcanic Edge._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15% Heat, +10% Status…R5=+90% Heat, +60% Status. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Volcanic Edge.name: Volcanic Edge
Volcanic Edge.description: A molten-core melee enhancement that combines extreme Heat output with high-dispersion impact geometry to maximize fire proc coverage per swing.
Volcanic Edge.tb_effect: Near-guarantees Heat procs on every melee hit at max rank while adding substantial fire damage. Best used on Bo staff where the wide sweep can hit multiple enemies in one swing, spreading burns.

Jagged Edge._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Slash Damage. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Naramon.
Jagged Edge.name: Jagged Edge
Jagged Edge.description: Serrates the melee weapon's edge to a micro-tooth profile that tears rather than cuts, dramatically increasing Slash damage output and bleeding proc frequency.
Jagged Edge.tb_effect: Adds Slash damage to your melee. Slash procs bypass armor entirely — dealing 35 HP/turn for 2 turns ignoring all mitigation. Excellent against high-armor Grineer. Stacks with Rending Strike for combined Slash+Puncture damage boost.

Sundering Strike._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Puncture Damage. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Naramon.
Sundering Strike.name: Sundering Strike
Sundering Strike.description: Hardens and reshapes the weapon tip into an armor-piercing profile, adding significant Puncture damage that penetrates hardened Grineer plating.
Sundering Strike.tb_effect: Adds Puncture damage to melee. Puncture procs reduce enemy outgoing damage by -30% for 1 turn. Pairs with Jagged Edge to cover two IPS types simultaneously — apply Slash Bleed + Puncture debuff in a single swing.

Organ Shatter._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 3. R0=+45%…R3=+135% Critical Multiplier. Drain: R0=4, R3=7. Madurai.
Organ Shatter.name: Organ Shatter
Organ Shatter.description: A biomechanical strike enhancer that targets anatomical weak points with terminal precision. Critical hits deliver catastrophic internal trauma far exceeding surface damage.
Organ Shatter.tb_effect: At max rank, multiplies melee critical damage by +135% (e.g. a 2.0x crit hit becomes a 3.35x hit). Combined with True Steel, Excalibur's Exalted Blade becomes a one-hit kill machine against non-boss enemies.

True Steel._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 3. R0=+30%…R3=+120% Critical Chance. Drain: R0=4, R3=7. Madurai.
True Steel.name: True Steel
True Steel.description: Reconfigures the weapon's balance and strike geometry for maximum probability of landing critical hits. Each swing finds the optimal angle for vital targeting.
True Steel.tb_effect: At max rank, dramatically increases melee crit chance. Skana with True Steel max-ranked has reliable crits on nearly every swing. Pair with Organ Shatter to stack both crit chance and crit multiplier for explosive damage output.

Reach._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+0.3m…R5=+1.5m Range. TB: hits additional target per range tier. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Naramon.
Reach.name: Reach
Reach.description: Extends the melee weapon's effective strike zone through micro-actuated blade elongation and improved arc geometry. Allows engaging targets that would otherwise be out of reach.
Reach.tb_effect: In TB, each 10% range bonus adds a +10% chance to hit a second enemy simultaneously with melee attacks. At max rank (+50%), your Skana swings have a 50% chance to hit a second target for the same damage (before damage mods).

Body Count._wiki_note: Wiki: Common, max rank 5. R0=+1s…R5=+6s Combo Duration. TB: combo stacks persist longer. Drain: R0=2, R5=7. Naramon.
Body Count.name: Body Count
Body Count.description: A momentum-sustaining mod that extends the decay timer on the Combo Gauge between strikes, allowing more hits before the multiplier resets.
Body Count.tb_effect: In TB, combo stacks decay 1 turn later per 20% bonus (max +5 turns at rank 5). Without Body Count, combo resets after 2 turns of no melee. With max Body Count, combo persists for 7 turns — letting you build massive multipliers over several combat rounds.

Life Strike._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 3. R0=+10%…R3=+40% Health per Heavy Attack. Drain: R0=4, R3=7. Madurai.
Life Strike.name: Life Strike
Life Strike.description: A life-drain enchantment that siphons a portion of damage dealt by heavy attacks back into the Warframe as healing. Converts offensive momentum into survivability.
Life Strike.tb_effect: When Exalted Blade energy waves deal damage, restore 40% of that damage as HP at max rank (costs 5 Combo stacks to activate). E.g. a 500-damage Exalted Blade wave restores 200 HP. A powerful sustain option for Excalibur in long fights.

Shimmering Blight._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare Polearm stance mod. Max rank 0. Drain: 2. Madurai.
Shimmering Blight.name: Shimmering Blight
Shimmering Blight.description: A Polearm Combat Discipline focused on fluid, sweeping attacks that disorient and debilitate opponents. Each strike flows into the next in a continuous arc of rotating blade.
Shimmering Blight.base_effect: Unlocks Shimmering Blight combo tree for Polearms
Shimmering Blight.max_effect: Unlocks Shimmering Blight combo tree for Polearms
Shimmering Blight.tb_effect: Stance for Polearm-class melee (future weapons). Passive: Polearm attacks have a +15% chance to apply a random elemental proc in addition to IPS damage. Excellent proc spreader.

Bleeding Willow._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare Polearm stance mod. Max rank 0. Drain: 2. Naramon.
Bleeding Willow.name: Bleeding Willow
Bleeding Willow.description: A Polearm discipline that leverages the weapon's length for extended-range attacks and disabling stabs. The willow metaphor captures the technique's flexible, bending guard posture.
Bleeding Willow.base_effect: Unlocks Bleeding Willow combo tree for Polearms
Bleeding Willow.max_effect: Unlocks Bleeding Willow combo tree for Polearms
Bleeding Willow.tb_effect: Alternative Polearm stance (future weapons). Passive: Every third consecutive melee action in the same combat turn deals a guaranteed Slash proc (Bleed) bypassing normal status chance. Great for sustained damage scenarios.

Clashing Forest._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare Staff stance mod. Max rank 0. Drain: 2. Naramon.
Clashing Forest.name: Clashing Forest
Clashing Forest.description: A Staff Combat Discipline that uses crossing, parrying strikes to first stagger targets before delivering powerful follow-up blows. The clashing of staves creates a disorienting rhythm.
Clashing Forest.base_effect: Unlocks Clashing Forest combo tree for Staves
Clashing Forest.max_effect: Unlocks Clashing Forest combo tree for Staves
Clashing Forest.tb_effect: Stance for Staff-class melee (Bo). Passive: On landing a Puncture proc via staff, the affected enemy loses their next action (stunned). Synergizes with Sundering Strike for guaranteed stun combos.

Flailing Branch._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare Staff stance mod. Max rank 0. Drain: 2. Vazarin.
Flailing Branch.name: Flailing Branch
Flailing Branch.description: An unorthodox Staff discipline that favors unpredictable, whipping attacks at full extension. The erratic motion makes the practitioner difficult to target while generating high-energy sweeping strikes.
Flailing Branch.base_effect: Unlocks Flailing Branch combo tree for Staves
Flailing Branch.max_effect: Unlocks Flailing Branch combo tree for Staves
Flailing Branch.tb_effect: Alternative Staff stance (Bo). Passive: Bo attacks gain a +20% chance to hit all enemies in the encounter simultaneously instead of just the primary target. Exceptional for multi-enemy combat rooms.

Tainted Mag._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+10% Mag Size, -5% Fire Rate…R5=+66% Mag Size, -30% Fire Rate. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Vazarin.
Tainted Mag.name: Tainted Mag
Tainted Mag.description: A high-capacity but poorly balanced magazine that crams significantly more rounds at the expense of handling speed. Useful for sustained fire in long engagements.
Tainted Mag.tb_effect: Tradeoff mod: more ammo per reload cycle at the cost of firing speed. At max rank Lato carries ~30 rounds per mag instead of 18, but fires 30% slower. Best when paired with Quickdraw to offset the reload penalty.

Gunslinger._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+12%…R5=+72% Fire Rate. Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Madurai.
Gunslinger.name: Gunslinger
Gunslinger.description: Dramatically overclocks the pistol's trigger mechanism and cycling assembly, transforming even a modest sidearm into a high-speed burst weapon.
Gunslinger.tb_effect: In TB, every 10% fire rate bonus grants a +10% chance of an extra pistol attack per action. At +72%, this means a 72% chance of firing twice per secondary action — nearly doubling effective DPS output.

Critical Delay._wiki_note: Wiki: Rare, max rank 5. R0=+25% Crit Chance, -10% Fire Rate…R5=+150% Crit Chance, -36% Fire Rate. Drain: R0=6, R5=11. Madurai.
Critical Delay.name: Critical Delay
Critical Delay.description: A crit-specialization mod that sharpens targeting algorithms for maximum precision, at the cost of cycling speed. Every fired round has dramatically higher critical potential.
Critical Delay.tb_effect: Alternative to Point Strike for builds that want maximum crit chance. At +150% crit chance, nearly every shot is a critical hit. The fire rate penalty reduces chances of an extra hit per action. Best on high-damage-per-shot weapons.

Seeker._wiki_note: Wiki: Uncommon, max rank 5. R0=+15%…R5=+90% Puncture Damage (Shotgun). Drain: R0=4, R5=9. Naramon.
Seeker.name: Seeker
Seeker.description: Modifies the shot pattern of a shotgun to include penetrating slug-style pellets that pierce cover and armor simultaneously. Exceptional against hardened infantry.
Seeker.tb_effect: Adds Puncture damage to your shotgun. Puncture procs reduce enemy damage output by -30% for 1 turn. Combine with Flechette for double Puncture stacking, maximizing armor mitigation against Grineer enemies.

Bleeding Wound._wiki_note: TB-original melee mod. Not in base Warframe. Adds passive Slash proc chance to all melee hits.
Bleeding Wound.name: Bleeding Wound
Bleeding Wound.description: Applies a serrated micro-edge treatment to melee weapons that passively causes bleeding wounds on every strike, independent of the weapon's base status chance.
Bleeding Wound.tb_effect: Each melee hit has a flat +30% chance (at max rank) to apply a Slash Bleed proc regardless of weapon status chance. This proc deals 35 HP/turn for 2 turns and bypasses armor. Very effective in long fights with high hit counts.

Rifle Ammo Drum._wiki_note: TB-supplemental. Common ammo capacity mod for rifles. +5%/rank max ammo. Drain: R0=2, R5=7.
Rifle Ammo Drum.name: Rifle Ammo Drum
Rifle Ammo Drum.description: Installs an extended drum magazine housing in the rifle's receiver, expanding total ammo reserve capacity without requiring frequent resupply.
Rifle Ammo Drum.tb_effect: Increases rifle ammo reserves by 30% at max rank. Provides more sustained firepower before requiring drops or ammo pickups. Low cost makes it a useful budget filler mod when mod capacity is available.
